users.Create Table:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  "first_name" varchar(80) NOT NULL,
  "last_name" varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL,
  "email" varchar(120) NOT NULL,
  "phone" varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  "password_hash" varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  "birth_date" date DEFAULT NULL,
  "profile_image_url" varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  "status_id" int NOT NULL,
  "last_login" datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  "created_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updated_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "avatar_url" varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  "delivery_zone" varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL,
  "vehicle_type" varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL,
  "vehicle_plate" varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL,
  "delivery_notes" text,
  "is_available" tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  "email_verified" tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  "verification_code" varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  "verification_expires_at" datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  "verification_sent_at" datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  "login_attempts" int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  "locked_until" datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
  UNIQUE KEY "uk_users_email" ("email"),
  UNIQUE KEY "uk_users_phone" ("phone"),
  KEY "fk_users_status" ("status_id"),
  CONSTRAINT "fk_users_status" FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES "status_catalog" ("id") ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE
)

user_sessions.Create Table:
CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "id" int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  "user_id" int NOT NULL,
  "token" varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  "device_name" varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL,
  "location" varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL,
  "last_active_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "status" varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  "created_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updated_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
  KEY "idx_user_sessions_user_id" ("user_id"),
  KEY "idx_user_sessions_status" ("status"),
  CONSTRAINT "fk_user_sessions_user" FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES "users" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE
)

password_reset_tokens.Create Table:
CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "id" int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  "user_id" int NOT NULL,
  "email" varchar(191) NOT NULL,
  "token_hash" char(64) NOT NULL,
  "expires_at" datetime NOT NULL,
  "used_at" datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  "requested_ip" varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  "user_agent" varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  "created_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updated_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
  UNIQUE KEY "uk_password_reset_tokens_hash" ("token_hash"),
  KEY "idx_password_reset_tokens_user" ("user_id"),
  KEY "idx_password_reset_tokens_email" ("email"),
  CONSTRAINT "fk_password_reset_tokens_user" FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES "users" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE
)

auth_rate_limits.Create Table:
CREATE TABLE "auth_rate_limits" (
  "id" int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  "action_type" varchar(80) NOT NULL,
  "identifier" varchar(191) NOT NULL,
  "attempts" int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  "window_started_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "blocked_until" datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  "created_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updated_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
  UNIQUE KEY "uk_auth_rate_limits_action_identifier" ("action_type","identifier")
)

auth_audit_logs.Create Table:
CREATE TABLE "auth_audit_logs" (
  "id" int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  "user_id" int DEFAULT NULL,
  "action" varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  "email" varchar(191) DEFAULT NULL,
  "ip" varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  "user_agent" varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  "metadata" json DEFAULT NULL,
  "created_at" datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
  KEY "idx_auth_audit_logs_user" ("user_id"),
  KEY "idx_auth_audit_logs_action" ("action")
)
